results.title: Jio sees further upside in ARPU, could rise to Rs 326 per month by FY31
results.description: Jio expects India's mobile broadband ARPU to climb to Rs 326.4 by FY31 as data usage and digital service adoption continue to rise. The post Jio sees further upside in ARPU, could rise to Rs 326 per month by FY31 appeared first on MEDIANAMA .

results.title: EPFO update: PF withdrawals through UPI and ATMs may soon become possible
results.description: The Employees’ Provident Fund Organisation (EPFO) is preparing to introduce a new mobile application that will connect directly with members’ bank accounts and integrate with UPI platforms such as BHIM and other digital payment services, aiming to make PF-related services faster and more convenient.EPFO update: PF withdrawals through UPI and ATMs may soon become possible [...] The post EPFO update: PF withdrawals through UPI and ATMs may soon become possible appeared first on ANC .
